name: grid-card-assemble
title: Grid Card Assemble
description: N labeled token cards stagger-assemble into a grid or vertical list with a fade plus short slide into slot, then hold perfectly still.
evidence: Wave J J1-6: hero-shelf layout / feature-tour unit per the adversarial panel recompose

variables.label: Layout
variables.description: Grid wraps by columns; list stacks vertically.

variables.label: Columns
variables.description: Grid column count (grid layout only). 0 picks automatically: one row up to 3 items, then ceil(sqrt(N)).

variables.label: Cues
variables.description: Comma-separated per-item entrance times in seconds. Blank entries use the default cascade.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Accent token family used by the tile dots.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: How the assembled layout leaves the frame. Default none: the hold ends the film.
